description: Matrix Apparels Ltd is a cornerstone of our manufacturing strength, specializing in high-volume knit and woven production. Established with a commitment to excellence, it has become a benchmark for industrial efficiency.
Our facility is equipped with the latest technology from global leaders, ensuring that every garment meets the rigorous standards of our international clients in the EU and North America.
Sustainability and worker welfare are at the heart of Matrix Apparels. We operate with full transparent compliance and hold multiple gold-standard certifications.
strengths: Full vertical integration from knitting to garment
Knitting: 60+ high-speed machines with ~22 tons/day capacity
Dyeing: 1,800 tons/month bulk capacity
Finishing: 75 tons/day processing capacity with European machinery
Production scale: 52 lines with ~3.2M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 6,200+ skilled personnel
Real-time ERP-based production monitoring
Proven export track record across EU and USA
Experience in licensed and branded product manufacturing

contact.hq: Bir Muktijoddha DM Ramiz Uddin Road 55/1, Borua Rajpara, Khilkhet, Dhaka- 1229, Bangladesh

description: IFS TEXWEAR (PVT.) LTD. is a premier, 100% export-oriented composite knit garments manufacturer and exporter based in Bangladesh. Established in 1999, we have grown into a global industry leader.
Our vision is to create the greatest knit clothing on the planet by consistently investing in quality and innovation. We are dedicated to providing unrivaled variety and superior products.
Quality is the cornerstone of our operations. Our facility utilizes advanced machinery from Japan, Germany, and the U.S. to ensure precision in every stitch.
strengths: 100% export-oriented composite knit garments unit
Full vertical integration setup
Knitting: Advanced machinery with ~15 tons/day capacity
Dyeing: 1,500 tons/month bulk capacity
Production scale: 45 lines with ~2.5M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 5,400+ skilled manpower
Licensed and branded product manufacturing global expertise
Real-time production and efficiency monitoring
High compliance and international quality standards

description: MB Knit Fashion is our specialized center for intricate knit designs and technical apparel. We pride ourselves on our ability to handle complex fashion-led programs with shorter lead times.
The facility features specialized dyeing and finishing units that allow us to experiment with unique textures and washes requested by modern fashion brands.
We maintain a strong focus on circular fashion, integrating recycled yarns and water-saving technologies throughout our production process.
strengths: Specialized center for intricate knit designs
Technical apparel expertise with short lead times
Circular fashion focus with recycled yarn integration
Production scale: 38 lines with ~2.1M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 4,800+ skilled personnel
Real-time Water-saving technology monitoring
In-house specialized dyeing and finishing units
Advanced fashion-led program management
Strict quality control for high-end retail brands

contact.hq: B/164-166 & B/185-187 BSCIC I/E, Fatullah,Narayanganj, Bangladesh

description: Lithe Group is a vertically integrated powerhouse delivering high-volume retail programs for the world's most demanding markets.
With 117 production lines, we have the scale to support massive global rollouts while maintaining the boutique quality that defines the Matrix Platform.
Our ERP-driven real-time monitoring ensures full traceability from yarn sourcing to final dispatch, providing peace of mind for our global partners.
strengths: Full vertical integration from knitting to garment
Knitting: 50 high-speed machines with ~18 tons/day capacity
Dyeing: 1,650 tons/month bulk capacity with 44 machines
Finishing: 65 tons/day processing capacity with advanced European machinery
AOP (All Over Print): 20 tons/day bulk + 250 kg sample capacity
Screen Print: ~300K pcs/day capacity with in-house setup
Cutting: 7 auto spreaders, 2 auto cutters, 18 cutting tables
Production scale: 117 lines with ~4M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 5,700+ skilled manpower ensuring stable output
Real-time ERP-based production and efficiency monitoring
Proven export track record across EU, UK and USA
Experience in licensed and branded product manufacturing

contact.hq: Lithe Complex, Asian Highway, Sanarpar, Siddhirgonj, Narayanganj, Bangladesh

description: Westknit Fabric Ltd focuses on the heavy-duty segment of our catalog, including heavy fleeces and premium French terry products.
This facility is strategically located to leverage local resources while maintaining high export standards for our European clients.
Our state-of-the-art knitting unit at Westknit is optimized for energy efficiency and minimal waste, reflecting our group-wide sustainability goals.
strengths: Heavy fleeces and premium French terry specialization
Energy-efficient knitting unit with minimal waste
Strategic location for resource optimization
Production scale: 30 lines with ~1.8M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 3,500+ skilled manpower
High-speed knitting machines for heavy-duty fabric
Reliable export standards for European markets
In-house fabric testing and quality assurance
Stable production output for bottomwear programs

description: Our Sri Lankan facility, Amanté Brand, is our center of excellence for technical lingerie and high-performance polyamide products.
Located in a BOI-approved zone, this unit combines Sri Lankan manufacturing craftsmanship with advanced technical capabilities for intimate apparel.
Amanté serves as our research and development hub for new material integrations and ergonomic design in the innerwear segment.
strengths: Technical lingerie center of excellence
High-performance polyamide product capability
BOI-approved manufacturing strength (Sri Lanka)
Production scale: 25 lines with ~1.2M pcs/month capacity
Workforce: 2,200+ specialized craftsmanship
Advanced R&D hub for innerwear ergonomics
New material integrations and innovative fabric use
Strict quality control for technical intimates
Global export track record in performance wear
